title: Georges Seurat A Sunday on La Grande Jatte Umbrella
description:
Taking Georges Seurat’s (French, 1859–1891) masterpiece A Sunday on La Grande Jatte —1884 as its inspiration, our folding umbrella is perfect for a rainy day.

Constructed of polyester, the umbrella features an aluminum shaft. 10 1/2 in. ; opens to 37 in. diameter.
